Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 28 

EYE_VSN_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Eye or Vision Services Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the eye and vision service provider 
category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: EYE_VSN_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: EYE_VSN_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base
